name: Argentina
avoid: Argentine summer (Dec-Feb) is hot in Buenos Aires

cities.name: Buenos Aires
cities.notes: Tango in La Boca, asado steaks, Palermo parks and Casa Rosada pink palace

cities.name: Patagonia
cities.notes: Torres del Paine trekking, Perito Moreno glacier walk and end-of-world drama

cities.name: Mendoza
cities.notes: Malbec wine country at the foot of the Andes with bodega tours

cities.name: Iguazu Falls
cities.notes: World's largest waterfall system — 275 falls wider than Niagara

cities.name: Bariloche
cities.notes: Patagonian lake district with Swiss-style chocolate shops and ski slopes

cities.name: Salta
cities.notes: Colonial churches, Cachi and Salinas Grandes salt flat day trips
